name: Metal Mesh Media Bin Black - Brightroom™
description:
The Metal Mesh Media Bin from Brightroom™ gives you the perfect storage bin for your home office, kitchen or kids’ room. The bin is perfectly sized to hold sticky notes, scissors, notebooks and other small items on a shelf or desktop. The metal mesh construction and open top provide airflow and easy access, and integrated carry handles make it a breeze to move around as needed.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
